message:
fix(core): resolve clippy warnings across all feature flag combinations

Fixes across 7 files:
- tantivy_ingest: Error::new(ErrorKind::Other) → Error::other(), fix LogReadError variant (Corrupt not Deserialize), replace empty if-branch with let _, replace redundant continue, explicit match variant for RecorderSourceDescriptor
- tantivy_reindex: Error::other() migration, add Sync bound to ReindexObserver for Send future
- metrics: add missing AsyncReadExt import for TcpStream::read
- mcp: replace wildcard matches with explicit Outcome variants
- mcp_tools: use eq_ignore_ascii_case instead of manual lowercase comparison
- fastembed_embedder: add #[must_use] to 4 builder methods
- search/daemon/client: add #[must_use] to builder method, replace 3 wildcard matches with explicit DaemonResponse variants

All feature combinations now pass clippy -D warnings:
  default, subprocess-bridge, mcp+subprocess-bridge+mcp-client,
  metrics+browser+recorder-lexical+semantic-search

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
